summary: Narrated USCIS public service announcement ('Need to register? Do it now') telling aliens they may need to register with the U.S. government under Trump's EO 14159. It uses stock B-roll (person typing on a laptop, a waving DHS 'Semper Paratus 1790' flag, a classroom) with voiceover, white caption text, and an ARR logo and URL end card. It uses voiceover with no music track. On-screen text reads 'with the U.S. government as an alien?', 'aliens register with the U.S. government', 'and you are 14 or older', 'If you are a parent', 'ARR Alien Registration Requirement', and 'FOR MORE INFO: USCIS.GOV/ALIENREGISTRATION'.
notable_text: with the U.S. government as an alien?; aliens register with the U.S. government; and you are 14 or older; If you are a parent; ARR Alien Registration Requirement; FOR MORE INFO: USCIS.GOV/ALIENREGISTRATION
